hero.title: Professional electrical solutions
hero.subtitle: Installations, maintenance and automation for industry and home in Empordà and Girona province.

about.title: About us
about.p1: We are a family-owned electrical company in Figueres with decades of experience. We work with rigor, proximity and commitment.
about.p2: We support the client throughout the full cycle: design, installation, commissioning and preventive maintenance.

items.p: Electrical panels, lines, protection and low-voltage legalization.
KNX integration, sensors, programming and efficiency improvements.
Periodic inspections, thermography and quick response to failures.
LED projects, lighting calculations and consumption reduction.

areas.title: Service areas
areas.p: Figueres, Girona, Alt Empordà, Baix Empordà and surroundings.

history.title: History
history.p1: From the beginning, we have focused on quality workmanship and responsible innovation.
history.p2: Our track record earns the trust of households, retailers and industry.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Tell us what you need and we’ll get back to you shortly.
